mechanics.excerpt: Theodore' troops and various mercenary groups joined the Republic's KungsArme in battle against the ronin; but poor contracts negotiated in haste paid most of the mercenar ies too much money for too little fighting: Free Rasalhague won its freedom_ but its citizens learned t0 loathe mercenaries_ In April 3039 Hanse Davion set in motion the second great wave of his to unite the Inner Sphere under his rule launched two-front attack the Dieron district the Draconis Combine_ The first assault wave succeeded brilliantly; but before Hanse could Iaunch second wave, the Combine counterattacked and threw the Commonwealth on the defen- sive Aided by the Star League Mechs ComStar had provided_ Theodore Kurita gambled with the fate of his nation and won.
